title: Clavicular breaks silence on contract claims as streamer VarisG reveals what really happened in Miami
summary_full: Braden Clavicular Peters is facing claims that he asked people to sign contracts before joining his livestreams. Streamer VarisG said the situation felt forced and uncomfortable during a Miami meeting. Other clips and reports also raised similar concerns. Clavicular says these were normal NDAs, but the claims remain unproven and are still being debated online.
